baseline_output:
[V186 Creator Knowledge Engine — use structure and constraints; do not copy verbatim.]
[V191 Target surface: tiktok — patterns and fragments weighted for this platform + monetization profile.]
Intent: Get more views (intent_views)
Scenario: Tutorial (sc_tutorial)
Recipe: Emphasize TikTok-native pacing and on-screen text compatibility.
High-weight patterns:
1. [caption_pack] [tiktok · caption_pack] Problem in hook → demo / before-after → one objection handled → shop or keyword CTA.
2. [caption_pack] [tiktok · caption_pack] Stakes in line 1 → 2–3 proof beats → twist → comment CTA (save/share) before hard sell.
Knowledge fragments (weighted selection):
1. (commerce_disclosure) TikTok Shop: lead with the problem the product solves in one line, show the product in frame early.
2. (tip) Story format: start mid-action, name the emotion, end with one takeaway viewers can use today.
3. (general_platform_safe) Avoid guaranteed income claims; use 'may', 'often', 'can help'. Disclose paid partnerships when applicable.
4. (tip) Strong hooks contrast 'common advice' vs 'what actually works' with a specific example niche.
v193_output:
[V186 Creator Knowledge Engine — use structure and constraints; do not copy verbatim.]
[V191 Target surface: tiktok — patterns and fragments weighted for this platform + monetization profile.]
[V193.3 Platform Difference Reinforcement — prioritize TikTok caption cadence + hook/title alignment (additive only).]
TikTok caption cadence rules:
- Keep captions short and spoken: 1–2 punchy lines + optional CTA line.
- Line 1 should continue the same angle as hook/title (same promise, no pivot).
- Use compact payoff phrasing (what changed, what to do next, or why this works).
- Chain style: proof_first · CTA intensity: medium.
Hook-aligned opener seed: I tested {tool/approach} on cozy desk setup for students for 7 days. Day 1 vs Day 7: {before} → {after}. Here’s the exact script I used.
Title-aligned phrasing seed: I tried one approach for cozy desk setup for students — here’s what changed (in 7 days).
CTA seed: Comment “{keyword}” and I’ll send the template for cozy desk setup for students (tomorrow).
Output short TikTok-ready captions (not blog copy, not SEO sentence blocks).
[V193.3 TikTok Chain Consistency — keep Hook/Caption/Hashtag/Title aligned for one post package.]
Chain style: proof_first · CTA intensity: medium
Shared voice rules:
- Use conversational spoken lines (short clauses, no formal essay tone).
- Keep wording native to TikTok feed language, avoid generic SEO phrasing.
- Carry the same opener intent across hook/caption/title (do not switch premise mid-chain).
Shared pacing rules:
- Front-load value in first line, then support with one tight payoff line.
- Prefer 1-idea-per-line cadence; avoid long compound sentences.
- Hashtag sets should mirror the same content angle as hook/title.
Shared CTA rules:
- CTA = action-oriented but still value-first; ask for one clear next step.
Shared monetization rules:
- Monetization fit: trust-building first (value/proof), then soft conversion.
- Do not use hard-sell language before delivering payoff.

conclusion: V193 TikTok observations + chain consistency add tool-specific reinforcement vs baseline.
